name: ixi-o-agent-local-voice-bridge
description: Proposed MCP tool surface for letting MISO read user-approved voice-session handoffs from a private local ixi-O Agent instance.

tools.name: list_voice_sessions
tools.description: List local voice-session metadata only. Does not return transcript or audio.

sourceSystem.description: Optional filter for Channel Talk/n8n sessions or Private Mode local voice sessions.

tools.name: read_voice_session_handoff
tools.description: Read a redacted handoff payload only after human review allows external workflow access.

tools.name: propose_case_from_voice_session
tools.description: Return a proposed MISO case creation request from an approved redacted handoff payload. The tool never creates a case directly.
